zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Mary Chamblee於大約1755年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州伯蒂時，她的父親Isaac Chamblee26歲，母親Lucretia Jones26歲。她於大約1772年與Joshua Burris在美國南卡羅來納州安德森結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1806年在美國南卡羅來納州安德森朋德萊頓享年52歲，埋葬在美國南卡羅來納州安德森莫特 特里薩礁 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Mary Chamblee于大约1755年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州伯蒂时，她的父亲Isaac Chamblee26岁，母亲Lucretia Jones26岁。她于大约1772年与Joshua Burris在美国南卡罗来纳州安德森结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1806年在美国南卡罗来纳州安德森朋德萊頓享年52岁，埋葬在美国南卡罗来纳州安德森莫特 特里薩礁 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Chamblee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of English   Chambley  .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Tryon Palace
historicEvents.description: Built on August 26, 1767, the Tryon Palace became the capitol building for North Carolina. The building was named after William Tryon a British officer and colonial official.

historicEvents.title: Edenton Tea Party
historicEvents.description: On October 25, 1774, the Edenton Tea Party took place. It was the first organized women's protest. They put their cups down and refused to buy any tea.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: South Carolina becomes the 8th state in the Union
historicEvents.description: On May 23, 1788, South Carolina ratifies the Constitution of the United States making it the 8th State of the Union.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Mary Chamblee was born about 1755, in Bertie, North Carolina, British Colonial America, her father, Isaac Chamblee, was 26 and her mother, Lucretia Jones, was 26. She married Joshua Burris about 1772, in Anderson, South Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1806, in Pendleton, Anderson, South Carolina, United States, at the age of 52, and was buried in Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, South Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Mary Chamblee est née environ 1755, à Bertie, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Isaac Chamblee, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lucretia Jones, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Joshua Burris environ 1772, à Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1806, à Pendleton, Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Mary Chamblee um 1755 in Bertie, North Carolina, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Isaac Chamblee 26 und ihre Mutter Lucretia Jones 26. Sie hat um 1772 in Anderson, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten Joshua Burris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1806 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Pendleton, Anderson, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Mary Chamblee è nata il circa 1755 nel Bertie, Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America, sua padre, Isaac Chamblee, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lucretia Jones, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Joshua Burris circa 1772, nel Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1806, nel Pendleton, Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Mary Chambleeが約1755年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州バーティーで生まれた時，父Isaac Chambleeは26歳，母Lucretia Jonesは26歳であった。約1772年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンでJoshua Burrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1806年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンペンドレトンで52歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンモウント タボル チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Bertie, Carolina, British Colonial Ameri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 버티
ko.Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, South Caro: 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 모우트 타볼 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Mary Chamblee(이)가 대략 1755년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 버티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Isaac Chamblee(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucretia Jones(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1772년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨에서 Joshua Burris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1806년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 펜들레턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 모우트 타볼 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Mary Chamblee nasceu aproximadamente 1755, em Bertie, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America, seu pai, Isaac Chamblee, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lucretia Jones, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Joshua Burris aproximadamente 1772, em Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1806, em Pendleton, Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Mary Chamblee родилась около 1755 г. в местности бирти, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Isaac Chamblee было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucretia Jones, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joshua Burris около 1772 г. в местности андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1806 г. в местности пендлетон, андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности маунт табор чурч, андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Mary Chamblee nació aproximadamente 1755, en Bertie, Carolina del Norte, British Colonial America, su papá, Isaac Chamblee, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lucretia Jones, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Joshua Burris aproximadamente 1772, en Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1806, en Pendleton, Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos.
